title: Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh
tagline: Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Jagannath temple is a Hindu temple at Nayagarh, Odisha, India.
overview.description: Jagannath temple is a Hindu temple at Nayagarh, Odisha, India. It was erected by Vinayak Singh Mandhata in between 1788 and 1808 CE. The architect of the unfinished temple was the father of the poet Yadumani. Jagannath temple at Laxmi Prasad area was erected by Jadunath Mangaraja, a king of Khandapada. It was reconstructed in 1972 by one Sri Nilakantha Sahu.

topPlaces.name: Nayagarh State
topPlaces.description: Nayagarh State was one of the princely states of India during the British Raj. It was located in present-day Nayagarh district, Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Nayagarh
topPlaces.description: Nayagarh is both a Town and the Municipality Headquarters of the Nayagarh District in the Indian State of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Barapalli
topPlaces.description: Barapalli is a village situated 3 km from district Nayagarh in Odisha, India. The village has around 150 houses.

topPlaces.name: Itamati
topPlaces.description: Itamati is a village in Nayagarh district of Odisha, India, 6 km from Nayagarh town.

topPlaces.name: Durdura
topPlaces.description: Durdura is a village in the Pitamahul gram panchayat of Birmaharajpur subdivision, Subarnapur district, Odisha, India. It is located on the side of the road connecting Birmaharajpur and Rairakhol town.

topPlaces.name: Sarankul
topPlaces.description: Sarankul is a small town under the district Nayagarh of Odisha.

items.note: Nayagarh State was one of the princely states of India during the British Raj. It was located in present-day Nayagarh district, Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (79 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh?
faq.a: Stays in Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jagannath Temple, Nayagarh?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nayagarh State, Nayagarh, Barapalli, Itamati, Durdura.
